  llms.txt for pheno-port-adapter ‚Äî LLM-friendly content discovery index.
  Spec: https://llmstxt.org/  (curated plain-text file at project root; "robots.txt for LLMs").
  Per ADR-042 element 7 + pheno-llms-txt (T20.7) v8 template (5-line quickstart + non-scope + 3 examples).
  Cross-references SPEC.md (T20.2), WORKLOG.md (T20.5), CHANGELOG.md (T20.6).
-->

# pheno-port-adapter

> Canonical hexagonal L4 Port/Adapter reference implementation for the pheno-* fleet. Defines the `PortAdapter` trait (Port side, ADR-038) and ships `TcpAdapter` + `UnixAdapter` (in-tree Adapter impls) + `MockAdapter` (test-only). Per ADR-014 + ADR-038, 19 of 22 pheno-* substrate Rust crates are migrating to this `Port` trait + `Adapter` impl shape. Sibling to `pheno-config` (typed config; `Connection::id` is consumed from endpoint strings) and `pheno-errors` (`AdapterError` mirrors the `AppError` 5-variant shape).

## Quickstart (5 lines)

```rust
use pheno_port_adapter::adapters::tcp::TcpAdapter;
use pheno_port_adapter::adapters::unix::UnixAdapter;
use pheno_port_adapter::PortAdapter;
let tcp = TcpAdapter::new();
let unix = UnixAdapter::new();
let _ = tcp.connect("127.0.0.1:9000").expect("connect");
let _ = unix.connect("/tmp/agent.sock").expect("unix connect");
```

## When to use

- You need a `Port` trait + `Adapter` impl contract per ADR-038 (hexagonal L4).
- You want one canonical `TcpAdapter` / `UnixAdapter` to back any pheno-* service's connection-lifecycle layer.
- You need a `MockAdapter` for hermetic in-process tests (no real sockets).

## When NOT to use

- You need async I/O ‚Äî adapters are sync; wrap with `tokio::task::spawn_blocking` if needed.
- You need TLS ‚Äî pair with `tokio-rustls` or `native-tls`; this crate only does plain TCP / Unix sockets.
- You need HTTP ‚Äî pair with `reqwest` or `hyper`; `pheno-port-adapter` is the lower-level Port layer.

## 3 examples (illustrative)

1. **`TcpAdapter::connect()` smoke test** ‚Äî `src/adapters/tcp.rs` + 5 inline unit tests cover the happy path, DNS failure, and timeout.
2. **`MockAdapter` for hermetic tests** ‚Äî `src/lib.rs` ships a `MockAdapter` impl that returns a pre-canned `Connection` without touching the network; used by every pheno-* service's `tests/` integration suite.
3. **`pheno-otel` OTLP span on connect** ‚Äî `examples/otel_quickstart.rs` calls `TcpAdapter::new()` and exports the resulting `Connection` handle through `pheno_otel::StdoutExporter` (ADR-037).

## Documentation

- [README.md](README.md): quickstart, install, when to use, when NOT to use.
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): project overview, conventions, governance for AI agents. Per-repo template (v11); cites ADR-023, ADR-038, ADR-042, ADR-040.
- [SPEC.md](SPEC.md): canonical 1-page specification (what / why / how / interface / status; per ADR-042 element 1). Cites the `Port` trait + `Adapter` impl pattern (ADR-038).
- [WORKLOG.md](WORKLOG.md): change history (ADR-025 v2.1 schema, 11 columns including `device:` field). Validator: `pheno-worklog-schema` v2.1.
- [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md): release notes, semver, breaking changes. Keep a Changelog 1.1.0.
- [STATUS.md](STATUS.md): weekly-refresh status doc with honest 71-pillar scorecard (Tier 0) and Factory AI Agent Readiness level 0 (Functional). Per ADR-041 + ADR-026.
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md): how to contribute. Branch prefixes, Conventional Commits, PR template, 80% lib coverage gate (ADR-040), pattern conformance (ADR-038).

## Optional

- [LICENSE-MIT](LICENSE-MIT): MIT license text (Copyright Koosha Pari 2026).
- [Cargo.toml](Cargo.toml): package manifest (v0.1.0). MSRV 1.82, edition 2021, `thiserror = "2.0"`, `pheno-otel = { path = "../pheno-otel" }` (ADR-037), empty `[workspace]` (standalone crate).
- [llvm-cov.toml](llvm-cov.toml): 80% lib coverage threshold (ADR-040).
- [scripts/coverage.sh](scripts/coverage.sh): cargo-llvm-cov coverage gate runner.
- [src/lib.rs](src/lib.rs): `PortAdapter` trait + `AdapterError` enum + `Connection` opaque handle + 5 inline `MockAdapter` unit tests.
- [src/adapters/mod.rs](src/adapters/mod.rs): adapters module root.
- [src/adapters/tcp.rs](src/adapters/tcp.rs): TCP transport adapter (sync; `std::net::TcpStream`).
- [src/adapters/unix.rs](src/adapters/unix.rs): Unix-domain socket adapter (sync; `std::os::unix::net::UnixStream`).
- [examples/otel_quickstart.rs](examples/otel_quickstart.rs): `pheno-otel` OTLP exporter wiring (ADR-037 √ó ADR-038).

## Sibling substrates (fleet)

- `pheno-config` ‚Äî typed config loader (consumes `Connection` ID in endpoint strings).
- `pheno-context` ‚Äî request context propagation (correlation IDs flow through `Connection`).
- `pheno-tracing` ‚Äî canonical observability substrate (ADR-036); `pheno-port-adapter` adopts the `tracing` feature flag for OTLP smoke test.
- `pheno-otel` ‚Äî OTLP exporter (consumes `pheno-port-adapter`'s connection-lifecycle spans).
- `pheno-errors` ‚Äî `thiserror`-aligned error envelope; `AdapterError` follows the same derive pattern.
- `pheno-flags`, `pheno-cli-base`, `pheno-agents-md`, `pheno-cargo-template` ‚Äî 4 of the 19 ad-hoc crates migrating to the `Port` trait + `Adapter` impl shape per ADR-038 adoption matrix.

## ADRs (governance)

- [ADR-014 (Hexagonal L4 ports)](../../docs/adr/2026-06-18/ADR-014-hexagonal-l4-ports.md): predecessor ‚Äî original Port trait + Adapter impl pattern.
- [ADR-023 (Agent-effort governance)](../../docs/adr/2026-06-15/ADR-023-agent-effort-governance.md): substrate placement + Rule 3.1 quality bar.
- [ADR-038 (Hexagonal L4 Port/Adapter policy)](../../docs/adr/2026-06-18/ADR-038-hexagonal-port-adapter-l4-policy.md): **canonical pattern contract; this crate is the reference impl**.
- [ADR-042 (Substrate quality bar)](../../docs/adr/2026-06-18/ADR-042-substrate-quality-bar.md): 7-element quality bar (this meta-bundle closes elements 1 + 7).
- [ADR-040 (Test coverage gates per tier)](../../docs/adr/2026-06-18/ADR-040-test-coverage-gates-per-tier.md): 80% lib/SDK gate.
- [ADR-036 (pheno-tracing canonical)](../../docs/adr/2026-06-18/ADR-036-pheno-tracing-canonical.md): observability substrate.
- [ADR-025 (worklog v2.1 schema bump)](../../docs/adr/2026-06-17/ADR-025-adr-015-v2-1.md): `device:` field.
- [ADR-030 (pheno-worklog-schema v2.1)](../../docs/adr/2026-06-17/ADR-030-pheno-worklog-schema-v2-1.md): 4 `device:` values pinned.
- [ADR-041 (71-pillar refresh cadence)](../../docs/adr/2026-06-18/ADR-041-71-pillar-refresh-cadence.md): weekly probe cadence.
- [ADR-026 (Factory AI Agent Readiness)](../../docs/adr/2026-06-17/ADR-026-factory-ai-agent-readiness.md): external cross-cutting standard.

## See also

- [findings/71-pillar-2026-06-17.md ¬ß 1.x](../../findings/71-pillar-2026-06-17.md): 71-pillar scorecard for this crate (Tier 0).
- [findings/71-pillar-2026-06-17-schema.md](../../findings/71-pillar-2026-06-17-schema.md): 71-pillar framework schema (ADR-024).
- [plans/2026-06-18-v8-dag-stable.md ¬ß 3.7](../../plans/2026-06-18-v8-dag-stable.md): T15.4 (`pheno-port-adapter` meta-bundle + tests).
- [pheno-worklog-schema v2.1](../../pheno-worklog-schema/SPEC-v2.1.md): worklog validator CLI.
- [pheno-ci-templates](https://github.com/KooshaPari/pheno-ci-templates): CI gate templates (per ADR-042 element 6).
